---
title: "Democratising Territorial Cohesion: Experimenting with deliberative citizen engagement and participatory budgeting in European regional and urban policies [DEMOTEC] (GA no. 962553)"
date: "2021"
year: "2021 – 2024"
funder: "Horizon 2020, SOCIETAL CHALLENGES - Europe In A Changing World - Inclusive, Innovative And Reflective Societies, European Commission"
categories: [Public Opinion & Argument Mining]
---

Democratising Territorial Cohesion: Experimenting with deliberative citizen engagement and participatory budgeting in European regional and urban policies [DEMOTEC] (GA no. 962553)
